name: Sarah Williams
subject: Application deadline extension
message: Hi, I was wondering if it's possible to get an extension on the grant application deadline? I have all my documents ready but my business financial statements won't be ready until next week. Please let me know if this can be arranged. Thank you!

name: Michael Chen
subject: Eligibility question for innovation grant
message: Good day, I'm the founder of a small tech startup and I'm interested in the Innovation Grant program. My business has been operating for 8 months. I wanted to confirm if the 6-month minimum operating requirement applies to innovation grants specifically or if it's different. Also, do you accept international founders?

name: Emily Davis
subject: Documents required for application
message: Hello, I've started my application for the small business grant but I'm unsure about what documents are needed. Could you please send me a checklist of required documents? Specifically, do I need to submit 3 years of tax returns or is 1 year sufficient for startups?

name: James Wilson
subject: Application status inquiry
message: I submitted my application two weeks ago (ID: APP-2026-004) and haven't heard back yet. Could you please provide an update on the status? I'm eager to move forward with my business expansion plans. Thank you for your time.

name: Amanda Torres
subject: Technical issue with form submission
message: Hi, I'm having trouble uploading my business plan document to the application form. The file is a 4MB PDF but it keeps failing to upload. I've tried on Chrome and Firefox. Can I email the document directly or is there another way to submit it?

name: Robert Johnson
subject: Grant amount adjustment
message: Hello, I submitted an application for $10,000 but after reviewing my business plan, I believe I need $15,000 to fully execute my expansion plans. Can I modify my application amount? Or do I need to submit a new application?
